Class Reply

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Reply
public class Reply extends Object

Title: Reply Class

Description: Entity for a reply with id, parent post id, body (max 1000), and author.

  • Constructor Details

    • Reply

      public Reply()

      Method: Reply()

      Description: This default constructor is not used in this system.

    • Reply

      public Reply(int id, int parentPostId, String body, String author)

      Method: Reply(int id, int parentPostId, String body, String author)

      Description: This constructor is used to establish user entity objects.

      Parameters:
      id - the unique id of this post
      parentPostId - is the id that this reply is attached to
      body - the body of the post
      author - the username attached to this post

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()

      Method: int getId()

      Description: This gets the id of a reply

      Returns:
      id is the identification number of reply

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)

      Method: void setId(int id)

      Description: This set a new id of a reply.

      Parameters:
      id - is the identification number of reply

    • getParentPostId

      public int getParentPostId()

      Method: int getParentPostId()

      Description: This gets the id of the parent post for this reply

      Returns:
      id is the identification number of the parent post

    • setParentPostId

      public void setParentPostId(int parentPostId)

      Method: void setParentPostId(int parentPostId)

      Description: This set a new parent post id for a reply

      Parameters:
      parentPostId - is the identification number of parent post id

    • getBody

      public String getBody()

      Method: String getBody()

      Description: This gets the body content reply.

      Returns:
      body String of a reply

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)

      Method: void setBody(String body)

      Description: This set a new body on a reply.

      Parameters:
      body - is what the body content will be

    • getAuthor

      public String getAuthor()

      Method: String getAuthor()

      Description: This gets the author of a reply.

      Returns:
      author string attached to a reply

    • setAuthor

      public void setAuthor(String author)

      Method: void setAuthor()

      Description: This sets a new author to a reply.

      Parameters:
      author - string to be attached to a reply
